code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut total = 0
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut done = false

while i < n and not done
  let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match bopt
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if total + v > 100
            done = true
          else
            total = total + v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not done and not string.is_empty(current)
  match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    if total + v > 100
      ()
    else
      total = total + v
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

print("total=#{total}")
